subject: [PATCH v5 14/21] nfsd: allow nfsd4_encode_fattr4_change() to work with no export

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch allows the nfsd4_encode_fattr4_change() function to work even when there is no export available, which can occur in certain callback scenarios such as CB_NOTIFY. The change ensures that the function does not attempt to access a svc_export when it's not present, preventing potential errors. This modification should be safe because NFS will not grant delegations on the V4 root anyway.
